text: I feel a distinct sense of isolation in this dimly lit environment. The quiet hum of fluorescent lights and the reflective, sterile glass make me acutely aware of my own presence. The minimal light renders the space ambiguous, and yet, the large R+D on the wall in the second image reminds me of the persistent drive for innovation even in the silence. The emptiness and darkness stir a meditative mood within me—as if I am poised on the threshold between past ambition and an uncertain future.
